2604.21896.title: Nemobot Games: Crafting Strategic AI Gaming Agents for Interactive Learning with Large Language Models
2604.21896.paper_summary: This paper introduces a new paradigm for AI game programming, leveraging large language models (LLMs) to extend and operationalize Claude Shannon's taxonomy of game-playing machines. Central to this paradigm is Nemobot, an interactive agentic engineering environment that enables users to create, customize, and deploy LLM-powered game agents while actively engaging with AI-driven strategies. The LLM-based chatbot, integrated within Nemobot, demonstrates its capabilities across four distinct classes of games. For dictionary-based games, it compresses state-action mappings into efficient, generalized models for rapid adaptability. In rigorously solvable games, it employs mathematical reasoning to compute optimal strategies and generates human-readable explanations for its decisions. For heuristic-based games, it synthesizes strategies by combining insights from classical minimax algorithms (see, e.g., shannon1950chess) with crowd-sourced data. Finally, in learning-based games, it utilizes reinforcement learning with human feedback and self-critique to iteratively refine strategies through trial-and-error and imitation learning. Nemobot amplifies this framework by offering a programmable environment where users can experiment with tool-augmented generation and fine-tuning of strategic game agents. From strategic games to role-playing games, Nemobot demonstrates how AI agents can achieve a form of self-programming by integrating crowdsourced learning and human creativity to iteratively refine their own logic. This represents a step toward the long-term goal of self-programming AI.
2604.21896.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文介紹了一種新的AI遊戲編程範式，利用大型語言模型（LLMs）來擴展和實現Claude Shannon的遊戲機器分類法。這一範式的核心是Nemobot，一個互動式的代理工程環境，使用戶能夠創建、自定義和部署基於LLM的遊戲代理，同時積極參與AI驅動的策略。集成在Nemobot中的基於LLM的聊天機器人展示了其在四類不同遊戲中的能力。對於基於字典的遊戲，它將狀態-行動映射壓縮成高效的通用模型，以實現快速適應。在嚴格可解的遊戲中，它利用數學推理來計算最佳策略，並為其決策生成易於理解的解釋。對於基於啟發式的遊戲，它通過結合經典的最小最大算法（例如，shannon1950chess）的見解與群眾來源數據來綜合策略。最後，在基於學習的遊戲中，它利用強化學習結合人類反饋和自我批評，通過試錯和模仿學習來迭代改進策略。Nemobot通過提供一個可編程的環境來擴大這一框架，使用戶可以實驗工具增強生成和戰略遊戲代理的微調。從戰略遊戲到角色扮演遊戲，Nemobot展示了AI代理如何通過整合群眾學習和人類創造力來實現自我編程的形式，從而迭代改進其自身邏輯。這代表了朝著自我編程AI的長期目標邁出了一步。
2604.21896.author: Chee Wei Tan et.al.
2604.21896.authors: Chee Wei Tan, Yuchen Wang, Shangxin Guo
